---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help improve Hammer Script
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Debug Information

### Browser
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari]
- Version: [e.g. 119.0]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]

### Script Version
- Version: [e.g. v2.2]

### Debug Tab Output
Please switch to the Debug tab and paste the last ~20 raw message lines here:

```
(paste debug output)
```

### Console Errors
If there are any errors in the browser console (F12), paste them here:

```
(paste console errors)
```

### Exported Data
If possible, click Export and attach or paste the relevant portions of the JSON file.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have checked the Debug tab to verify message detection
- [ ] I have exported my data before reporting
- [ ] I have included browser version and console errors
- [ ] I have searched existing issues for duplicates
